description: True-3D ECHOES of the local neighbourhood: 2M++ at Manticore peculiar-velocity distances + a per-realization Zone-of-Avoidance completion drawn from each Manticore posterior density field.
note: Completed catalog(realization i) = observed + local_2mpp_zoa_mcmc<i>.npz. PROV 0=observed, 5=ZoA-inpaint. The ensemble over realizations carries the Manticore reconstruction's posterior uncertainty.
